Evertune: The Trade Desk Vets Building the Bloomberg Terminal for AI Search

Brian Stempeck scaled a $50B adtech company. Now he's betting GEO — Generative Engine Optimization — will become the most important channel no PMM is thinking about yet.

March 2, 2026 • By Chris O'Hara

Brian Stempeck

CEO & Co-Founder, Evertune

🏢 Founded: April 2024 💰 $23M Raised 📍 New York

The Thesis

Here's the uncomfortable truth: 25% of traditional search volume will disappear by 2026 (Gartner). It's not going to another search engine — it's going to AI.

When 58% of consumers use GenAI for product recommendations (Capgemini) and 90% of B2B buyers use it to research vendors (Forrester), the question isn't whether AI search matters. It's whether you're visible when an agent asks "what's the best solution for X?"

That's the bet Brian Stempeck is making with Evertune.

The Team

This isn't a first-time founder pitch deck. The Evertune founding team spent a combined 20+ years scaling The Trade Desk from startup to $50B public company:

  • Brian Stempeck — 11 years at The Trade Desk, rose to Chief Strategy Officer
  • Poul Costinsky — From Adbrain, acquired by TTD in 2017
  • Ed Chater — Also from Adbrain, deep adtech data infrastructure experience

They know what it takes to build category-defining measurement infrastructure. Now they're applying that playbook to AI search visibility.

The Product

Evertune is building what they call the "Bloomberg Terminal for AI search" — a comprehensive platform to monitor, measure, and improve how your brand appears across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and AI Overviews.

🔍 AI Brand Monitoring

Track brand visibility and sentiment across AI platforms with competitive benchmarking

🌐 AI Website Optimization

Audit how AI crawlers interpret your site; get fixes for LLM discoverability

📊 AI Content Strategy

Identify which sources influence AI recommendations; data-driven content creation

🎯 AI Retargeting

Programmatic ads on URLs that AI cites most (via Trade Desk/Index Exchange)

The Numbers

$4M
Seed Round
$19M
Series A (Eniac)
800M+
ChatGPT Weekly Users

Why It Matters for PMMs

Traditional SEO was built for a world where humans searched, clicked, and browsed. That world is ending.

When an AI agent evaluates your product category, it doesn't:

  • Click through 10 blue links
  • Read your landing page hero copy
  • Watch your explainer video
  • Download your whitepaper

It synthesizes information from sources it trusts and returns a recommendation. If your brand isn't being cited, you're invisible in the fastest-growing discovery channel in B2B.

💡 The Key Insight

"If you're not optimizing for AI search, you're optimizing for yesterday's internet." GEO isn't a nice-to-have anymore — it's table stakes for discoverability in an agent-mediated world.

What to Watch

Evertune is early — they just closed their Series A in late 2024. But they're attacking a real problem with serious enterprise DNA. Fortune 500 brands like Miro are already customers.

The question isn't whether GEO becomes critical. It's how fast the shift happens, and whether Evertune can establish itself as the measurement layer before the space gets crowded.

For PMMs: this is worth understanding now, not later.

Learn more: evertune.com
